prompt: Overhead view of a yoga class in a sunlit studio. Eight people on mats in child's pose, arranged in rows on light bamboo flooring. Floor-to-ceiling windows letting in warm golden morning light. Minimalist space with white walls, no mirrors. Warm, calm, aspirational. No faces visible, just bodies at rest. Lifestyle wellness photography, warm earthy tones.

Interior of a bright yoga studio. Empty room with light bamboo floors, floor-to-ceiling windows with sheer curtains, neatly stacked yoga mats and cork blocks along one wall. A single plant in a terracotta pot in the corner. Natural light flooding in, peaceful and inviting. No people. Architectural interior photography, warm natural tones.

Close-up of a hand browsing a class schedule on a phone screen in a cozy cafe setting. Warm background blur with a coffee cup. Natural light, relaxed mood. Shallow depth of field focusing on the phone. Lifestyle photography, warm tones.

Overhead flat lay of a yoga mat partially rolled out on a light wood floor. A water bottle, a small towel, and a pair of simple slip-on shoes placed neatly beside it. Clean, minimal composition. Soft natural light from the side. Product lifestyle photography, warm earthy tones.

Wide shot of a bright yoga studio with a small group settling onto their mats before class. Soft morning light, bamboo floors, props neatly arranged. People sitting cross-legged, eyes closed, preparing to begin. Calm, welcoming atmosphere. No identifiable faces. Lifestyle wellness photography, warm natural tones.

Close-up of hands in prayer position (namaste) at chest level during yoga practice. Soft focus background showing a bright studio. Warm, golden light. Simple and meditative. No face visible, just the torso and hands. Lifestyle wellness photography, soft earthy tones.

Portrait of a woman in her late 30s sitting cross-legged on a yoga mat in a bright studio, smiling gently. Wearing simple earth-toned yoga clothes. Warm natural light from a window to the side. Calm and approachable. Environmental portrait photography, warm natural tones.

Abstract close-up of a rolled yoga mat on a bamboo floor, warm light casting long shadows. Minimal, graphic composition. Shallow depth of field. The mat is a muted terracotta color. Calm and meditative. Product photography, warm earthy tones.

Yoga class in early morning light. Several people in warrior II pose in a bright studio with large windows. Golden sunrise light streaming in. Silhouette-like quality, warm and energetic. No identifiable faces. Lifestyle wellness photography, warm golden tones.

Peaceful yin yoga scene. A person in a supported reclined butterfly pose on a mat with bolsters and blocks. Soft overhead natural light, quiet studio atmosphere. Deeply relaxed and restorative. No identifiable face. Lifestyle wellness photography, soft muted tones.

Yoga class in warm evening light. Small group flowing through sun salutations in a studio with pendant lights and warm interior glow. Dusk light through windows mixing with warm artificial light. Energetic but calm. No identifiable faces. Lifestyle wellness photography, warm amber tones.

Bright weekend yoga class with diverse group of people in downward dog pose. Sunny studio with lots of natural light, plants near the windows. Communal, energetic, welcoming atmosphere. No identifiable faces. Lifestyle wellness photography, bright warm tones.

Quiet meditation circle. A small group of people sitting cross-legged on cushions in a circle on a bamboo floor. Eyes closed, hands on knees. Soft, diffused natural light. Intimate and peaceful. No identifiable faces. Lifestyle wellness photography, soft warm tones.

One-on-one yoga session. An instructor gently adjusting a student's shoulder alignment in a standing pose. Bright, airy studio with no one else present. Warm and personal. No identifiable faces, shot from behind or side. Lifestyle wellness photography, warm natural tones.

Beginner-friendly yoga class scene. An instructor demonstrating a simple seated twist while students follow along on their mats. Bright studio with props (blocks, straps) visible on every mat. Supportive and inclusive atmosphere. No identifiable faces. Lifestyle wellness photography, warm earthy tones.

Exterior of a charming Brooklyn brownstone building with a small sign reading yoga studio above the door. Willow trees and a quiet sidewalk. Warm afternoon light, peaceful neighborhood setting. No people. Architectural photography, warm natural tones.

Portrait of a woman in her late 30s standing in a yoga studio doorway, leaning against the frame with arms folded, smiling warmly. Wearing simple yoga clothes in earth tones. Natural window light behind her. Confident and welcoming. Environmental portrait photography, warm natural tones.

Headshot portrait of a woman in her late 30s with dark hair pulled back, gentle smile, wearing a simple earth-toned top. Soft natural light, plain warm-toned background. Friendly and professional. Portrait photography, warm tones.

Headshot portrait of a man in his early 30s with short dark hair and a warm smile, wearing a simple dark t-shirt. Soft natural light, plain warm-toned background. Approachable and athletic. Portrait photography, warm tones.

Headshot portrait of a woman in her early 30s with long dark hair, gentle smile, wearing a simple muted-color top. Soft natural light, plain warm-toned background. Calm and kind. Portrait photography, warm tones.

Wide shot of an empty yoga studio practice room. Light bamboo floors, white walls, floor-to-ceiling windows with soft natural light. A few plants, neatly stacked mats along the wall. Serene and spacious. Architectural interior photography, warm natural tones.

Welcoming studio entrance and small reception area. A simple wooden desk, a vase of dried flowers, shoes lined up on a shelf. Warm pendant light, natural materials. Clean and inviting. Interior photography, warm earthy tones.

Clean, minimalist changing area in a yoga studio. Wooden cubbies for belongings, a small bench, warm overhead lighting. Towels neatly folded, a mirror on the wall. Simple and well-maintained. Interior photography, warm tones.

Close-up of a wall-mounted shelf of yoga props. Cork blocks stacked neatly, colorful straps hung on hooks, rolled bolsters in earthy colors. Warm natural light from the side. Organized and inviting. Product photography, warm earthy tones.

Small outdoor courtyard behind a Brooklyn studio. A few potted plants, a wooden bench, string lights overhead. Brick walls, a small tree. Warm afternoon light. Peaceful urban oasis. No people. Outdoor photography, warm natural tones.

Close-up of a simple tea station in a yoga studio lobby. Ceramic teapot, small cups, loose leaf tea in glass jars on a wooden shelf. A small sign reading herbal tea. Warm, cozy, inviting. Product photography, warm earthy tones.

Abstract close-up of light and shadow patterns on a bamboo yoga studio floor. Morning sunlight creating geometric shapes through window frames. Warm, meditative, graphic. No people. Abstract photography, warm golden tones.

Dynamic shot of a yoga class flowing through a vinyasa sequence. Multiple people in low lunge position on mats in a bright studio. Energy and movement, warm morning light. No identifiable faces. Lifestyle wellness photography, warm tones.

Sunrise light streaming through large studio windows casting golden beams across an empty yoga studio with bamboo floors. Dust particles visible in the light. Ethereal and calm. No people. Interior photography, golden warm tones.

Overhead view of a yin yoga class. People in supported forward fold with bolsters, evenly spaced on mats. Soft, diffused light. Deep stillness and surrender. No identifiable faces. Lifestyle wellness photography, soft muted tones.

Community yoga workshop in a studio. A circle of about 12 people sitting on mats, one person speaking or demonstrating at the front. Plants around the room, afternoon light. Engaged and communal. No identifiable faces. Lifestyle photography, warm natural tones.
Artistic vertical shot of stacked cork yoga blocks and a rolled cotton strap on a bamboo floor. Warm side light creating a shadow. Minimal, textural, tactile. Product photography, warm earthy tones.
Close-up of hands resting on knees in lotus position during meditation. Simple bracelet on one wrist. Soft light, shallow depth of field. Calm and focused. Lifestyle photography, soft warm tones.

Pilates mat class in progress. Several people doing the hundred exercise on mats, legs raised, arms pumping. Bright studio light, focused energy. No identifiable faces. Lifestyle fitness photography, warm bright tones.

Summer outdoor yoga class in a small courtyard with brick walls. A group on mats practicing tree pose under string lights. Warm golden hour light, urban but peaceful. No identifiable faces. Lifestyle wellness photography, warm golden tones.

Vertical shot of the studio courtyard in the evening. String lights glowing, a potted fig tree, the studio door visible with warm light spilling out. Inviting and atmospheric. No people. Architectural photography, warm evening tones.

Two hands holding ceramic cups of herbal tea in a studio lobby. Warm light, blurred background of shelves and plants. Intimate moment of post-class connection. No identifiable faces, just hands. Lifestyle photography, warm cozy tones.

Gentle prenatal yoga class. Three women in a supported wide-legged seated position with bolsters. Soft diffused light, calm and nurturing atmosphere. No identifiable faces. Lifestyle wellness photography, soft warm tones.

A yoga studio decorated for a seasonal workshop. Dried flowers in vases, candles on a small altar, extra cushions arranged in a circle. Warm, inviting, special-occasion atmosphere. No people. Interior photography, warm earthy tones.

Close-up of a hand gently resting on a yoga mat on a bamboo floor. Warm light from the side, soft focus on the background studio. Simple, inviting, grounding. Lifestyle photography, warm earthy tones.

Exterior entrance of a yoga studio on a tree-lined Brooklyn street. A simple wooden door with a small brass sign, potted plants flanking the entrance. A welcome mat and warm light visible through the glass. Afternoon light, inviting and approachable. No people. Architectural photography, warm natural tones.
